title: Wagner Moura Wins Golden Globe for Best Actor in Drama - Hollywood Reporter
text: Brazilian actor Wagner Moura won the Golden Globe for Best Male Actor in a Drama Film at the 2026 ceremony for his role in The Secret Agent. This marks his first Golden Globe win, following a previous nomination for his work in Netflix's Narcos. The film also secured the award for Best Foreign Language Film. Directed by Kleber Mendonça Filho, The Secret Agent is set during Brazil's 1977 military dictatorship. In his acceptance speech, Moura reflected on the film's themes, stating that it explores memory, or the lack of memory, and generational trauma. He emphasized that if trauma can be passed down through generations, so can values.
